name: Microwave Maple Bacon Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a microwaveable pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
2. Beat the Bisquick baking mix, half of the cheese, milk, maple syrup, sugar, and eggs with a wire whisk or hand beater until only small lumps remain. Pour into the pie plate.
3. Place the pie plate on an inverted microwaveable dinner plate in the microwave.
4. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), rotating the pie plate 1/4 turn every 2 minutes, until most of the top no longer appears doughy, about 5 to 7 and a half minutes.
5. Sprinkle with remaining cheese and bacon.
6. Microwave uncovered on the inverted plate just until the cheese is melted, about 1 to 1 and a half minutes longer.
7. Serve with maple-flavored syrup if desired. Makes 8 servings.
